mapper.select: SELECT distinct uuvm.stm_fir_reg_user_id ,aum.user_nm FROM dm_ui_ver_mst uuvm, ad_user_mst aum WHERE 1=1 AND uuvm.stm_fir_reg_user_id = user_id

SELECT a.stb_ui_ver ,a.ui_ver_expl ,a.use_yn ,a.stm_fir_reg_date ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmFirRegDate ,NVL(a.stm_fir_reg_user_id,' ') stmFirRegUserId ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmLastUpdDate ,NVL(a.stm_last_upd_user_id,' ') stmLastUpdUserId ,b.user_nm stm_fir_reg_user_nm ,c.user_nm stm_last_upd_user_nm FROM dm_ui_ver_mst a, ad_user_mst b , ad_user_mst c WHERE a.stm_fir_reg_user_id = b.user_id(+) AND a.stm_fir_reg_user_id = c.user_id(+) AND a.stb_ui_ver = #{stbUiVer}
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_ui_ver_mst WHERE stb_ui_ver = #{stbUiVer}

SELECT b.sw_file_nm ,b.use_yn ,b.sw_file_ver ,b.stm_fir_reg_date ,b.stm_fir_reg_user_id ,a.user_nm FROM um_sw_file_dtl b , ad_user_mst a WHERE b.stm_fir_reg_user_id = a.user_id(+) AND b.stb_ui_ver = #{stbUiVer} ORDER BY b.stm_fir_reg_date desc

SELECT a.stb_full_ver ,a.stb_ui_ver ,a.stb_ui_ver_expl ,a.patch_dy ,a.stm_fir_reg_date ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmFirRegDate ,NVL(a.stm_fir_reg_user_id,' ') stmFirRegUserId ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmLastUpdDate ,NVL(a.stm_last_upd_user_id,' ') stmLastUpdUserId ,aum.user_nm stmFirRegUserNm FROM dm_ui_ver_map a, ad_user_mst aum WHERE 1=1 AND a.stm_fir_reg_user_id = aum.user_id AND a.stb_ui_ver like '%'||#{stbUiVer}||'%'
ORDER BY a.stm_last_upd_date desc

SELECT a.stb_full_ver ,a.stb_ui_ver ,a.stb_ui_ver_expl ,a.patch_dy ,a.stm_fir_reg_date ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmFirRegDate ,NVL(a.stm_fir_reg_user_id,' ') stmFirRegUserId ,NVL(TO_CHAR(a.stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.MM.dd'),' ') stmLastUpdDate ,NVL(a.stm_last_upd_user_id,' ') stmLastUpdUserId ,b.user_nm stm_fir_reg_user_nm ,c.user_nm stm_last_upd_user_nm FROM dm_ui_ver_map a, ad_user_mst b , ad_user_mst c WHERE 1=1 AND a.stb_full_ver like '%'||#{stbFullVer}||'%' AND a.stm_fir_reg_user_id = b.user_id(+) AND a.stm_fir_reg_user_id = c.user_id(+)
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_ui_ver_map WHERE stb_full_ver = #{stbFullVer}
